item.summary: This recall is being initiated following FDA's recommendation based on certain observations noted during an August 15, 2025, inspection of the manufacturing facility that may bear on product quality. Product details: exchange select, Menthol -Cough Suppressant Oral Anesthetic, Honey Lemon Flavor Cough Drops, 30-count bag, Manufactured for Your Military Exchanges By: Medical Group Care, LLC., 1035 Collier Center Way, STE 5, Naples, FL, Made in China, NDC 83698-580-30, UPC: ...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
